audit_items.proof_trace: The property holds. `instanceLinkCloseConnection` (L989) sets `c->data = NULL` before calling `redisAsyncFree(c)` (L991) on every code path, so when pending callbacks are flushed by `__redisAsyncFree`, `sentinelDiscardReplyCallback` reads `link = c->data == NULL` and the `if (link)` guard prevents any dereference. When `refcount > 0`, callbacks are rebound but the `instanceLink` remains live (not freed), so `c->data` still points to a valid object.
